title: 493910 691667 Air Filter with Pre Filter Replacement for Briggs & Stratton 4166 5075H 5075 5075K 198707 28A702 28B702 28B707 28D707 8.5HP 10.5HP 11.5HP Vertical Engines Lawn Mower Lawn Tractor
features: Air filter replaces part number: 691667, 493910, 4166, 5075, 5075H, 5075K. Pre Filter replaces B&S 272477, 272477S, 4199.
Replacement for Cub Cadet 1027 1030 130 933E 933R lawn mower.
Please compare it with your original parts before ordering it to make sure this part will fit.
Package included: 1 x Air filter, 1 x Spark plug, 1 x Fuel filter, 1 x Fuel shut off valve, 4 x Clamp.
description: Features: Air filter replaces part number: # 691667, 493910, 4166, 5075, 5075H, 5075K Pre Filter replaces B&S # 272477, 272477S, 4199.
